name: Use Entity
desc: Player interacts with (attacks or right-clicks) an entity.

fields.name: hitVec
fields.desc: Target position on the entity (for INTERACT_AT)

notes: ATTACK sends damage to the target entity. INTERACT opens inventory/rides. INTERACT_AT is for hitting specific entity hitboxes (like Armor Stand limbs).

modules.name: KillAura
modules.purpose: Send ATTACK action on target entities. Criticals intercept and inject C04 offset packets before the attack. NoDamageFriends cancels attacks on friend entities. AutoClicker sends attacks on mouse-over entities.

modules.name: AutoClicker
modules.purpose: Send ATTACK action on target entities. Criticals intercept and inject C04 offset packets before the attack. NoDamageFriends cancels attacks on friend entities. AutoClicker sends attacks on mouse-over entities.

modules.name: NoDamageFriends
modules.purpose: Send ATTACK action on target entities. Criticals intercept and inject C04 offset packets before the attack. NoDamageFriends cancels attacks on friend entities. AutoClicker sends attacks on mouse-over entities.

modules.name: Criticals
modules.purpose: Send ATTACK action on target entities. Criticals intercept and inject C04 offset packets before the attack. NoDamageFriends cancels attacks on friend entities. AutoClicker sends attacks on mouse-over entities.

modules.purpose: Send ATTACK action on target entities. Criticals intercept and inject C04 offset packets before the attack. NoDamageFriends cancels attacks on friend entities. AutoClicker sends attacks on mouse-over entities.
